ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(CSR_Reviewed__c ), NOT(OR( ISPICKVAL(Application_Status__c, "System Approved"), ISPICKVAL(Application_Status__c, "Analyst Approved") )), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Verification_Status__c , "Verified")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: CSR review cannot be completed if application is not approved and verification is not completed
